---
title: "joshpy"
subtitle: "Python client for Josh ecological simulations"
---

**joshpy** enables parameter sweeps, experiment tracking, and result analysis
for [Josh](https://joshsim.org) agent-based ecological simulations.

![](assets/joshsim.png)

## Features

- **Orchestration**: Define parameter sweeps with Jinja templating and execute simulations
- **Tracking**: DuckDB-backed registry for experiment management  
- **Analysis**: Query results across parameter values and replicates
- **Visualization**: Quick matplotlib diagnostics + R/ggplot2 for publication-quality figures

## Get Started

- [Installation](getting-started/installation.qmd) - Install joshpy
- [Quickstart](getting-started/quickstart.qmd) - Run your first simulation
- [Tutorials](tutorials/index.qmd) - Step-by-step guides

## Tutorials

### Orchestration

- [Manual Workflow](tutorials/manual-workflow.qmd) - Step-by-step parameter sweep using individual components for maximum control
- [SweepManager Workflow](tutorials/sweep-manager.qmd) - Simplified workflow using high-level `SweepManager` class
- [Switching Josh Versions](tutorials/switching-versions.qmd) - Use stable, development, or custom Josh builds
- [Remote Runs in Parallel](tutorials/remote-execution.qmd) - Distribute simulations across Josh Cloud

### External Data

- [Preprocessing](tutorials/preprocessing.qmd) - Convert geospatial data to Josh's `.jshd` format
- [External Data Sweeps](tutorials/external-data-sweep.qmd) - Sweep over different input data files
- [Timestep Interventions](tutorials/timestep-interventions.qmd) - Single-time data for initialization and discrete events

### Debugging

- [Debug Output Inspection](tutorials/debug-inspection.qmd) - Trace agent behavior with structured debug log analysis

### Optimization & Analysis

- [Adaptive Optimization](tutorials/adaptive-sweep.qmd) - Bayesian parameter optimization with Optuna
- [Analysis & Visualization](tutorials/analysis.qmd) - Explore results with queries, plots, and R/ggplot2

## Links

- [Josh Language Documentation](https://joshsim.org)
- [Josh GitHub Repository](https://github.com/SchmidtDSE/josh)
- [joshpy GitHub Repository](https://github.com/SchmidtDSE/joshpy)
